age_range.evidence: The real-world 15,000 Social Media Analytics dataset was also used to demonstrate real-life, practical evaluation. For our evaluations 20 posts were used from the 15,000 (Kaggle dataset)... The data set includes linguistic indicators for each age group and confidence level. For instance, age-specific indicators include "homework" and "high school" for teens, "career" and "apartment" for young adults, "mortgage" and "kids" for adults, and "retirement" and "grandchildren" for seniors.

countries.evidence: Jiang and Ngien [3] studied the effects of Instagram on the self-esteem and social anxiety among users in Singapore.

fieldwork_year.evidence: The dataset spans from January 2023 to December 2024

sample_size.evidence: The real-world 15,000 Social Media Analytics dataset was also used to demonstrate real-life, practical evaluation.
